sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n35767" key="e)nnaumaxe/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐνναυμᾰχέω</orth>, <sense id="n35767.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ναυμαχέω ἐν . .</ref></xr>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.1078d</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
